nasb.text: If there is a man who lies with his uncle’s wife he has uncovered his uncle’s nakedness; they will bear their sin. They will die childless.

esv.text: If a man lies with his uncle’s wife, he has uncovered his uncle’s nakedness; they shall bear their sin; they shall die childless.

cnv.text: 如果有人與叔伯的妻子同睡，就是揭露了叔伯的下體，這樣作的人要擔當自己的罪；他們必無子女而死。

ccb.text: 如果有人与伯母或婶母同寝，就是羞辱他的伯父或叔父。二人要承担自己的罪恶，必无子女而死。
